resources.string: Aeons of ash tremble above the sealed throne-world
AEONS OF ASH TREMBLE ABOVE THE SEALED THRONE WORLD.

The interstellar dust begins to shed from the dead planet before the sky understands why. One green optical eye opens in the dark, then ten thousand more, ranked beneath the weight of forgotten ages. Obsidian obelisks rise through the crust with the patience of verdicts. The young species nesting among our stars call themselves nations, empires, futures. They are squatters scratching names on a stolen floor. The true sovereigns have awakened.
DUST FALLS FROM A DEAD WORLD. GREEN EYES OPEN BY THE THOUSAND. OBSIDIAN OBELISKS RISE. THE THIEVES OF THE STARS LEARN THAT THE TRUE SOVEREIGNS HAVE AWAKENED.
